endpoints.name: Get all top-level domains supported for registration.
endpoints.description: Get all top-level domains supported for registration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Get details of a top-level domain.
endpoints.description: Get details of a top-level domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Gets all legal agreements that user needs to accept before purchasing a domain.
endpoints.description: Gets all legal agreements that user needs to accept before purchasing a domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.
